rag_rules: Fix AGREE syntax errors by correcting invalid bracket or keyword usage in contract expressions.
Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible identifiers and valid helper declarations in the same annex scope.
generic_rules: Validate that all AGREE contract elements are syntactically correct and semantically aligned with AADL component scopes.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the model's configured dependencies.
When diagnostics indicate type mismatches, align helper declarations with the expected expression types (bool, int, real).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within valid AADL component type or implementation scopes.
Use only visible AADL features or helper declarations within the same annex for contract expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to fix syntax errors by adding new architecture elements; focus on correcting the existing contract structure.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types that are not declared in the model or its dependencies.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics related to component type annexes
AGREE syntax in component implementation scopes
